items.title: Android Developers · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Top 3 AI on Android updates for building intelligent experiences (Google I/O 2026)
items.titleZh: Android 上用于构建智能体验的 3 大 AI 更新（Google I/O 2026）
items.summary:
了解 Google I/O 上宣布的 Android 三大人工智能更新，打造智能体验。我们介绍了新的 AppFunctions API、Gemini Nano 4 的设备上升级、Firebase AI Logic 混合推理等等。 

查看 Android 上的官方 AI 播放列表以了解更多信息 → https://goo.gle/IO26-AI-on-Android 

资源：
订阅 Android 开发者 → https://goo.gle/AndroidDevs 

#AndroidDevelopers #Gemini #GoogleIO 

事件：Google I/O 2026

主讲人：施靖宇

提及的产品：Gemini、Android
items.summaryOriginal:
Catch up on the top three AI updates for Android to build intelligent experiences announced at Google I/O. We cover the new AppFunctions API, on-device upgrades with Gemini Nano 4, Firebase AI Logic Hybrid inference and many more. 

Check out the official AI on Android playlist to learn more → https://goo.gle/IO26-AI-on-Android 

Resources:
Subscribe to Android Developers → https://goo.gle/AndroidDevs 

#AndroidDevelopers #Gemini #GoogleIO 

Event: Google I/O 2026

Speaker: Jingyu Shi

Products Mentioned:, Gemini, Android
items.summaryZh:
了解 Google I/O 上宣布的 Android 三大人工智能更新，打造智能体验。我们介绍了新的 AppFunctions API、Gemini Nano 4 的设备上升级、Firebase AI Logic 混合推理等等。 

查看 Android 上的官方 AI 播放列表以了解更多信息 → https://goo.gle/IO26-AI-on-Android 

资源：
订阅 Android 开发者 → https://goo.gle/AndroidDevs 

#AndroidDevelopers #Gemini #GoogleIO 

事件：Google I/O 2026

主讲人：施靖宇

提及的产品：Gemini、Android

items.title: Fireship · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Google’s AI endgame is here… everything you missed at I/O 2026
items.titleZh: Google 的 AI 终局已至……您在 I/O 2026 上错过的一切
items.summary:
尝试并行使用 Emergent 的专用代理来构建任何全栈应用程序 - https://app.emergent.sh/?utm_shift=redirect&via=fireship

在 Google I/O 2026 上，Sundar Pichai 和 Demis Hassabis 制定了 Google 的“代理双子座时代”路线图，双子座隐藏在每件产品中，就像血液中的微塑料一样。但他们还宣布了什么？

#编码 #programming #google #ai 

🔖 涵盖的主题
- Google I/O 2026 公告
- 现在一切都是代理
- 谷歌的TPU芯片
- 双子座全能
- 反重力

想要更多火船吗？

🗞️时事通讯：https://bytes.dev
🧠 课程：https://fireship.dev
items.summaryOriginal:
Try using Emergent's specialized agents in parallel to build any full-stack application - https://app.emergent.sh/?utm_shift=redirect&via=fireship

At Google I/O 2026, Sundar Pichai and Demis Hassabis set out the roadmap for Google's 'agentic Gemini era', with Gemini hiding inside every product like the microplastics in your bloodstream. But what else did they announce?

#coding #programming #google #ai 

🔖 Topics Covered
- Google I/O 2026 Announcements
- Everything is an agent now
- Google's TPU chip
- Gemini Omni
- Antigravity

Want more Fireship?

🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev
🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

items.title: StatQuest with Josh Starmer · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: How AI works in Super Simple Terms!!!
items.titleZh: 人工智能如何用超级简单的术语运作！！！
items.summary:
在这个 StatQuest 中，我们解释了像 ChatGPT 这样的 AI 是如何工作的。然而，我们不会使用大量复杂的数学，而是使用一个超级简单的例子和​​超级简单的术语。如果数学让您感到害怕，那么这个 StatQuest 就适合您！即使数学并没有吓到您，这个 StatQuest 也会让您更深入地了解幕后发生的事情。嘭！

如果您想支持 StatQuest，请考虑...
Patreon：https://www.patreon.com/statquest
...或者...
YouTube 会员：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtYLUTtgS3k1Fg4y5tAhLbw/join

...从 StatQuest 商店购买一本书、一本学习指南、一件 T 恤或连帽衫或一首歌曲...
https://statquest.org/statquest-store/

...或者只是捐赠给 StatQu...
items.summaryOriginal:
In this StatQuest we explain how AI, like ChatGPT, works. However, instead of using lots of complicated math, we're going to use a super simple example and super simple terms. If math scares you, this StatQuest is for you! And even if math doesn't scare you, this StatQuest will give you a deeper understanding of what goes on under the hood. BAM!

If you'd like to support StatQuest, please consider...
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/statquest
...or...
YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtYLUTtgS3k1Fg4y5tAhLbw/join

...buying a book, a study guide, a t-shirt or hoodie, or a song from the StatQuest store...
https://statquest.org/statquest-store/

...or just donating to StatQu...
